era: Seattle. Stoner Rock / Heavy Psych. E=6 -- fuzz-forward, psychedelically extended, meditative weight.

name_reference.source: Valley of the Giants: old-growth Douglas fir grove in the Oregon Coast Range
name_reference.significance: Explicitly PNW old-growth naming. Scale of ancient forest in the music.

genre_lineage.foundation: Black Sabbath (Tony Iommi downtuned Laney amp, *Black Sabbath* 1970, *Paranoid* 1970, *Master of Reality* 1971)
genre_lineage.desert_rock: Kyuss (Palm Desert CA, 1987-1995); Queens of the Stone Age (Josh Homme); Fu Manchu; Monster Magnet
genre_lineage.doom_stoner: Sleep (*Dopesmoker* / *Jerusalem*: 63-minute single track, genre extreme endpoint)
genre_lineage.pnw_adaptation: More atmospheric, more interior, greyer than California desert rock. Forest not desert.

heavy_psych_sounds.significance: International heavy psych market. European distribution gives international profile to Seattle band.

sound_analysis.primary_tool: Fuzz guitar: warm, harmonically rich, not harsh high-gain. Enormous and slightly out of focus.
sound_analysis.song_structure: Long songs (typically 8-12 min). Riff establishment → development → psychedelic extension/drift.
sound_analysis.riff_philosophy: Riff as mantra: slow repetition creates meditative states. Sleep's influence.
sound_analysis.vocals: Mid-range, buried in mix, another texture not the focal point.
sound_analysis.e6_placement: Mid-to-high energy. Physical presence AND psychedelic extension in equal measure. Not the speed attack of post-hardcore; not the maximum weight of sludge.

theory_nodes.concept: Stoner rock lineage: Black Sabbath (1970) → Kyuss (1987-1995) → Sleep (*Dopesmoker*) → contemporary heavy psych. Tony Iommi's downtuned warm guitar tone is the genetic code of the genre. PNW adaptation: forest not desert, grey not sun, interior not expansive.
theory_nodes.description: Stoner rock lineage from Sabbath through desert rock to PNW heavy psych.

theory_nodes.concept: Heavy Psych Sounds Records (Italy, 2012): vinyl-first international label for stoner/doom/psych. Valley of the Giants on HPS = access to European festival circuit and international heavy psych audience. Disproportionate European market for American stoner/doom.
theory_nodes.description: HPS: Italian independent as international heavy psych infrastructure.

cross_references.relationship: E=8 to E=6. Post-hardcore to stoner rock. Mathematical ferocity to meditative weight. Tacoma to Seattle.
E=6 holds. Both stoner rock. Double stoner degree 255-256. Seattle continues.

sps_pair.pairing_note: FIRST ANTHROPOGENIC SPS entry. Low-frequency road percussion of heavy equipment on forest roads. Forest road meets forest music. Working PNW landscape in two registers: industrial and sonic.

milestones: STONER ROCK / HEAVY PSYCH enters engine
HEAVY PSYCH SOUNDS RECORDS enters engine
